name: x-twitter-mcp-server
title: X/Twitter MCP Server — Post, Search & Monitor X/Twitter with Claude
description: MCP server for X/Twitter. Post tweets, create threads, reply, search, follow, and monitor your account directly in Claude Desktop. Supports OAuth 1.0a (read+write) and Bearer Token (read-only).

apiKey.name: X_APP_KEY + X_APP_SECRET + X_ACCESS_TOKEN + X_ACCESS_SECRET
apiKey.description: X/Twitter OAuth 1.0a credentials (full read+write). Or X_BEARER_TOKEN for read-only.

tools.name: x_get_timeline
tools.description: Get the home timeline — recent posts from followed accounts

tools.name: x_get_notifications
tools.description: Get mentions of the authenticated user

tools.name: x_search_tweets
tools.description: Search tweets by keyword, hashtag, or from:username via X API or optional Hermes Tweet/Xquik backend

tools.name: x_get_tweet_thread
tools.description: Fetch a tweet and its full conversation thread

tools.name: x_get_profile
tools.description: Get a user profile by username

tools.name: x_get_followers
tools.description: Get followers list for any account

tools.name: x_get_user_tweets
tools.description: Get recent tweets from a specific user

tools.name: x_search_users
tools.description: Search for users by name or keyword

tools.name: x_get_media_specs
tools.description: Get X/Twitter media format specs (dimensions, size limits, formats)

tools.name: x_create_tweet
tools.description: Post a tweet — text, link card, image, or video

tools.name: x_create_thread
tools.description: Post a series of connected tweets (thread)

features: OAuth 1.0a full read+write and Bearer Token read-only modes
Optional Hermes Tweet/Xquik backend for read-only tweet search
Token-bucket rate limiter respecting X free-tier limits
Auto-retry with exponential backoff on HTTP 429
SSRF protection for media URL uploads
Prompt injection protection via randomised EXTCONTENT markers
Username to user ID resolution cache
